nodes.name: Typeform Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives Typeform submission. All fields mapped from Typeform hidden/visible fields.

nodes.name: Validation Error?
nodes.notes: Routes to error handler if validation failed

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.CLIENT_ID, niche: $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.NICHE, target_audience: $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.TARGET_AUDIENCE, tone_guide: $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.TONE_GUIDE, cta_keyword: $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.CTA_KEYWORD, brand_terms_to_avoid: $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.BRAND_TERMS_TO_AVOID, free_resource_url: $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.FREE_RESOURCE_URL, tiktok_scheduler: 'metricool', email_provider: 'ConvertKit', disclaimer_rules: {} }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.CLIENT_ID, week_start: $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.WEEK_START, status: 'queued' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, text: '✅ New client provisioned!

Client: ' + $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.CLIENT_NAME + ' (' + $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.CLIENT_ID + ')
Niche: ' + $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.NICHE + '
CTA: ' + $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.CTA_KEYWORD + '
Week start: ' + $('Validate & Parse Payload').item.json.WEEK_START + '

Research run queued for next Monday 06:00.', parse_mode: 'HTML' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: 'onboarding', workflow: 'onboarding-provisioning', level: 'error', message: $execution.error?.message || 'Validation failed', payload: { body: $('Typeform Webhook').item.json } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, text: '🔴 Onboarding failed: ' + ($execution.error?.message || 'Unknown error'), parse_mode: 'HTML' }) }}

_meta.templateNotes: Import into n8n. Set SUPABASE_URL, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID as n8n environment variables. Configure supabaseApi credential with SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY. Error branch nodes (Log Error + Alert, Telegram Error Alert, Respond 400) connect from n8n Error Trigger node added to workflow.
